'''Rach'talik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], the explosives specialist of [[Shala]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] on [[Courkrus]]. In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], in an attempt to catch the "[[Corran Horn/Legends|Ghost Jedi]]," Shala had Rach'talik rig his warehouse with explosives. Unbeknownst to Shala, Rach'talik betrayed his master in an attempt to surpass him, rigging the explosives in a way so that it would trap Shala long enough for him to know he was betrayed before killing him as well.

{{Char-stub}}
